title: cola vandersmisseniana
intro: Cola vandersmisseniana, a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, is commonly known as the yellow cola or cola vandersmisseniana. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The health benefits of cola vandersmisseniana include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and bark are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
